title: Petroleum Statistics, Iran, 1956-1958 (World Bank, 1960)
source_org: International Bank for Reconstruction and Development (World Bank)
source_url: https://openknowledge.worldbank.org (World Bank Archives, Iran country documents)
extraction_method: MANUAL TRANSCRIPTION, not bulk download. Original document is a 1960 scanned World Bank report (data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1960_current_economic_position_and_prospects.pdf) with a poor-quality OCR text layer (garbled digits in places). Every value in this file was verified by rendering the exact source page (Table 2, page 37) to a high-resolution PNG (pdftoppm -r 200) and visually reading the table directly from the image, cross-checked against the raw pdftotext extraction. This page's raw OCR text was largely legible and matched the image; no discrepancies were found. No value was interpolated, estimated, or fabricated.
license_terms: World Bank Archives — public disclosure authorized document
notes: Source document: data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1960_current_economic_position_and_prospects.pdf — Table 2, page 37, source: NIOC. Calendar years (not solar/fiscal years) unlike most other tables in this report. 'Consortium' = the international oil consortium operating in Iran; NIOC = National Iranian Oil Company. Prices row footnote states the posted price fell to $1.81/barrel in July 1959 (not part of the annual series, so not included as a data column here). Part of a systematic effort to extract Pahlavi-era (esp. 1941-1960) data from primary-source PDFs already in data/raw/.
